Home › How It Works

How it works

From first message to a freshly striped lawn — four steps, no paperwork, no pressure. Swipe through the process.

Get a Free Quote Call or Text
01

Contact us

Send the quick quote form, or call and text us directly at (519) 835-0774. Tell us your address and what you need — takes under a minute.

Start here
02

Get your free quote

We reply within 24 hours — usually same-day — with a firm price for your exact property. Mowing starts at $27.50 per cut, everything included.

See pricing
03

Service begins

You get a consistent weekly day and the same crew every visit — mowing, trimming, edging and blowdown, with rain days shifted and communicated.

What’s included
04

Stay because it’s good

No contracts, no cancellation fees. Skip a week or stop anytime with a text. Most clients stay all season — and 75+ five-star reviews say why.

Get a Free Quote

Swipe or use the arrows to move through the steps.

Questions first?

Talk to us before you decide

No sales script, no pressure — call or text (519) 835-0774, email Carter@yardexguelph.ca, or read our FAQ and 75+ five-star reviews first.

Ready for step one?

The form takes under a minute, and the quote is free either way.

Get Your Free Quote

No contracts. No cancellation fees. We reply within 24 hours — usually much faster.

Yardex

Student-built lawn care in Guelph since 2020. A team of 5 with commercial equipment, 50 weekly lawns, and no contracts — ever.
